action_plan.instruction: Run the launcher and approve the UAC prompt: .\scripts\repair-public-tunnel-admin.cmd. Replace the Cloudflare tunnel token at firm_command_center\secrets\cloudflare_tunnel_token.txt first; this replays the private VPS tunnel setup without printing the token.

Run the launcher and approve the UAC prompt: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\register-command-center-watchdog.ps1 -RunNow -PublicUrl https://ops.evolutionarytradingalgo.com. This registers Eta-CommandCenter-Doctor and starts a repair-capable doctor run.
